latest.title: red umbrella tree trick you got wrong
latest.script_key: watch this tree s umbrella trick the red thing isn t an umbrella at all that s a bird s nest built inside a hollow trunk the bark hides the gap so it looks like a canopy prop that s why we think it s fake until the bird flies out did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Chickens remember familiar faces in the flock
latest.script_key: chickens can remember individual faces watch the face and posture first because chickens learn who is familiar inside the flock that memory helps them choose who to follow avoid or challenge the tiny stare is not empty would you recognize the same bird twice

latest.title: Bees dance directions back to the hive

latest.title: Insects hear with their knees
latest.script_key: knees aren t just for bending watch the tiny bump on this leaf hopper s front leg that s its eardrum it hears through its knees because sound waves vibrate the joint no ears on its head that s why ever feel something buzz before you see it same trick

latest.title: chickens perch like dinosaurs you won't believe

latest.title: Snakes sample the air with a tongue flick

latest.title: Butterflies taste flowers with their feet

latest.title: Forests can cool the air below them
